definition:
κἀκεῖνος, -είνη, -εῖνο
 (by crasis for καὶ ἐκεῖνος, and so sometimes written, see: ἐκεῖνος), 
and he, she or it; he, she or it also: Mat.15:18 23:23, Mrk.12:4-5 16:11, 13, Luk.11:7, 42 20:11 22:12, Jhn.6:57 7:29 10:16 14:12 17:24 19:35, Act.5:37 15:11 18:19, Rom.11:23, 1Co.10:6, 2Ti.2:12, Heb.4:2.†
 (AS)
